en.name: Kalashnikov AKM 7.62x39 assault rifle modified
en.description: A modified version of the Kalashnikov AKM assault rifle chambered in 7.62x39mm. The weapon features a polished action, reworked gas system, and reinforced internal components intended to improve reliability, recoil recovery, and heat dissipation. The modifications make the rifle easier to control during rapid fire while preserving the durability and operating characteristics of the original design.
